creator: trasz@FreeBSD.org
text:
On 0126T0908, Cy Schubert wrote:
 > Hi Edward,
 > 
 > I'm trying to reproduce your screen/bash problem locally, on my machines at 
 > home or at work, however I cannot. I tried to reproduce it again on 
 > freefall but I cannot. Do you still have the problem?
 
 Hm, I'd swear I already replied to that question few months ago and
 the PR was closed.  Strange.  Anyway - no, I'm not able to reproduce the
 problem for quite some time.
 
 -- 
 If you cut off my head, what would I say?  Me and my head, or me and my body?
